rules.rule_text:
title: .RDP File Created By Uncommon Application
id: fccfb43e-09a7-4bd2-8b37-a5a7df33386d
related:
- id: f748c45a-f8d3-4e6f-b617-fe176f695b8f
  type: derived
status: test
description: 'Detects creation of a file with an ".rdp" extension by an application
  that doesn''t commonly create such files.

  '
references:
- https://www.blackhillsinfosec.com/rogue-rdp-revisiting-initial-access-methods/
- https://web.archive.org/web/20230726144748/https://blog.thickmints.dev/mintsights/detecting-rogue-rdp/
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-04-18
modified: 2024-11-01
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: .rdp
    Image|endswith:
    - \brave.exe
    - \CCleaner Browser\Application\CCleanerBrowser.exe
    - \chromium.exe
    - \firefox.exe
    - \Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe
    - \iexplore.exe
    - \microsoftedge.exe
    - \msedge.exe
    - \Opera.exe
    - \Vivaldi.exe
    - \Whale.exe
    - \olk.exe
    - \Outlook.exe
    - \RuntimeBroker.exe
    - \Thunderbird.exe
    - \Discord.exe
    - \Keybase.exe
    - \msteams.exe
    - \Slack.exe
    - \teams.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
